content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Pasha and Stick". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/610/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the length of the stick.
content.outputFormat: Print 'Yes' if it is possible to divide the stick into two parts such that the sum of the white balls in the left part is equal to the sum of the white balls in the right part, and 'No' otherwise.

solution.approach: Use two pointers to track the sum of white balls on the left and right sides of the stick.
